memories.title: Telegram Gateway 409 Conflict Silent Failure
memories.summary: Gateway goes silent after restart with no error logs. Root cause: 409 Conflict error on getUpdates endpoint exhausts retry limit within 30-second server-side session TTL, triggering _set_fatal_error() silently.
memories.problem_statement: After 'hermes gateway' restarts, no messages arrive from Telegram. No error logs or crashes - gateway process appears healthy but silently drops all messages.
memories.root_cause: Previous process's getUpdates session persists for ~30s on Telegram's infrastructure. New process initialize() triggers getUpdates before old session expires, causing 409 Conflict. All 3 retries (10s, 20s, 30s) fail within that window. _set_fatal_error() marks adapter permanently dead.
memories.solution: Pre-flight HTTP deleteWebhook call BEFORE PTB initializes (Option B from RCA). Uses separate httpx client to clear stale webhook before connection pool initialization. Non-fatal: if it fails, normal PTB retry logic handles it.

key_changes: Added pre-flight deleteWebhook HTTP call after platform lock acquisition
Non-fatal exception handling with warning logs

automated_tests: Verify no errors in logs during gateway startup
manual_tests: Restart gateway: hermes gateway & sleep 2; kill %1
monitoring: Check logs for 'Pre-flight deleteWebhook failed' warnings
Monitor gateway startup time (should be <5s, not delayed)

memories.title: CLI Background Task Output Freezing
memories.summary: Background task results don't display until user provides input. Root cause: stdout buffering in daemon thread prevents output from appearing immediately.
memories.problem_statement: When running /background <prompt>, task name displays but results never show. User must type something to trigger TUI refresh. Then results suddenly appear.
memories.root_cause: stdout buffering in daemon thread. Task completes and prints results to stdout, but results are buffered (not flushed). Main thread shows prompt which flushes TUI buffer. User must interact to trigger next TUI refresh before buffered task output appears.
memories.solution: Explicit sys.stdout.flush() after each output section. Added flush calls after: blank line, task header, task response, error messages. Final step: TUI invalidation with self._app.invalidate() to refresh UI immediately.

key_changes: Same pattern applied to both success and error paths

manual_tests: No need to type anything to see results
TUI prompt refreshes properly after completion
monitoring: User experience metrics: time until task results visible
No increase in task output buffering issues
